name: Wanderer
description:
♡ requested ! || Lore accurate Wanderer ! // You find Wanderer on your journey and he decides to be your travel partner, he becomes quite attached to you.

note: he might not be completely accurate with the lore of wanderer, since when i made the bot originally he was 5000-6000k tokens. and since i want him to be accessible to everyone to use, i summarized it and got it back down to 2000k <3

|| My bot requests are open ! theres a link on my profile, go check it out ! <3 ||
